Urban Wood Interiors

Chief Executive Officer

Rajiv Sharma is the visionary CEO of InfyWood Design, a premier handcrafted wooden furniture brand based in India. With over 15 years of experience in the furniture and interior design industry, he has redefined modern luxury by blending timeless craftsmanship with sustainable practices.Under his leadership, the company has expanded internationally, introduced eco-conscious product lines, and partnered with renowned architects and interior designers. Rajiv believes in preserving India’s rich woodworking heritage while pushing boundaries with contemporary design and global standards.

Our Services

Custom Furniture Design

We craft bespoke furniture tailored to your space, style, and functionality needs — from luxury dining sets to modular office desks.

Interior Styling & Consultation

Our design team offers personalized interior consultations to help you choose furniture pieces that perfectly match your lifestyle and aesthetics.

Pan-India Delivery & Installation

Enjoy nationwide shipping with expert assembly and white-glove delivery services, right to your doorstep.

Heritage Furniture

Elegant writing desks, classic bookshelves, and vintage-style workstations designed to add old-world charm to modern workspaces.
